---
title: "Page 2 - Video Page"
id: "mod001-se01-sec02-sp02"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec02"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---

## Video

_Embed the video link or iframe here._

## What to look for

_Provide 2-3 specific points for the learner to focus on while watching._

## Key ideas

_Summarize the main concepts presented in the video._

## Follow-up

_Suggest a next step or related resource after viewing._

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec02-sp01.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 1 - Data Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec02-sp03.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Page 3 - Text Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
